title: AI Developer:in RAG
raw_description:
Für einen unserer Endkunden sind wir aktuell auf der Suche nach einem:einer AI Developer:in RAG auf freiberuflicher Basis. 

Projekt:

We’re building an enterprise AI chatbot on SAP BTP Kyma using SAP Joule, Node.js/TypeScript, NestJS, mastra AI, and OpenSearch.
We’re looking for a quick- learning engineer with proven production AI adoption to implement advanced RAG, agent-based capabilities, robust API and MCP integrations, and rigorous evaluation/testing.
The focus is AI architecture and reliability first, with solid backend, CI/CD, observability (Dynatrace), and SAP HANA via TypeORM.
SAP Joule knowledge is a plus.

Aufgaben: 

 Design and implement agentic capabilities: tool/function calling, planning, memory/state, safety guardrails, and failure recovery for production stability.
Build advanced RAG pipelines on OpenSearch: hybrid retrieval, index/chunking strategies, embeddings/rerankers, query rewriting, and retrieval evaluation.
Develop and maintain API and MCP integrations: impl
score_reason: High score due to AI/LLM focus, likely remote work, and modern SAP BTP stack with enterprise AI development.
